name: Chifeng Jilong Gold Mining Co.,Ltd.
summary: The company's main business is gold, non-ferrous metal mining and selection and comprehensive resource recycling business, which is mainly carried out through its subsidiaries. Subsidiaries Geelong Mining, Huatai Mining, and Wulong Gold are engaged in gold mining and dressing business; subsidiary Hanfeng Mining is engaged in zinc, lead, copper, and molybdenum mining and dressing business; Vientiane Mining in Laos is currently mainly engaged in copper mining and smelting, and has The production of the gold mine will be restarted in May 2020; Xiongfeng Environmental Protection and Guangyuan Technology are both in the comprehensive resource recycling industry, Xiongfeng Environmental Protection is engaged in the comprehensive recycling and utilization of non-ferrous metal resources, and Guangyuan Technology is engaged in the processing of waste electrical and electronic products. The company has established a development strategy of "focusing on mining and focusing on gold mining business" to stabilize the main gold mining business and intends to divest non-mining business.
